description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a rectangular black upholstered seat and a matching upright backrest at one end. The upholstery appears smooth and unadorned, giving it a minimalist and contemporary look. The frame and legs are constructed from light-colored wood, providing a warm contrast to the dark seat and backrest. The legs are cylindrical and straight, supporting the chaise at each corner and at the backrest for stability. The backrest is solid and rectangular, with no visible tufting or decorative elements, and is positioned at one end of the chaise. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern black upholstered chaise with a rectangular wooden frame and straight cylindrical legs, featuring a solid upright backrest at one end. The design is minimalist and contemporary, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the black seat and the solid rectangular backrest, with two wooden legs visible at the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise's length, the upright backrest at one end, and the wooden frame and legs supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the backrest and the supporting wooden frame, with the cylindrical legs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the full length of the seat and the backrest at the far end.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a solid, rectangular panel upholstered in black material, with a flat surface and no visible decorative elements or segmentation. It is upright and extends the full width of one end of the chaise.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of light-colored wood, with a smooth finish and no decorative carvings or embellishments. They are positioned at the corners and at the backrest for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached seat cushion covering the entire seating area and an integrated backrest cushion at one end, both appearing to be fixed in place with no loose or layered cushions.
